name: Qualified Payment Election for Family Business Transfers

eligibility.description: Applies to transfers of interests in controlled corporations or partnerships to family members where the transferor retains a preferred interest.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can elect to treat certain distribution rights as 'qualified payments' (fixed-rate cumulative dividends), which allows these rights to have a non-zero value when calculating the gift tax on a transfer of junior equity to family members.
